creator: yuri@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #30)

> So what problem are you seeing when you add USES=fortran to your Makefile and build math/R with gfortran?

Same errors: //usr/local/lib/gcc6/libgfortran.so.3: undefined reference to `__getf2@GCC_4.6.0'
etc...


> Congratulations with your commit bit.

Thank you!
